title: SIEM Investigation: Splunk Lab — Part 1
description: Walking through Splunk architecture, SPL basics, and setting up your first SIEM investigation — from forwarders to search heads.

title: Detection in Splunk: Credential Dumping & C2 Activity
description: Hands-on detection of LSASS credential dumping via LOLBins (rundll32.exe) and tracing a full attack chain from fileless PowerShell malware to C2 callback using Sysmon event logs.

title: HTB Sherlock: The Watchman's Residue (Holmes 2025-2)
description: A detailed walkthrough of the HTB Sherlock challenge — Holmes 2025-2: The Watchman's Residue. Covers DFIR investigation methodology.

title: HTB Sherlock: MangoBleed
description: Walkthrough of the HTB MangoBleed Sherlock challenge — a digital forensics investigation.

title: HTB Sherlock: Whisper
description: Deep-dive walkthrough of the HTB Whisper Sherlock challenge, covering memory forensics and artifact analysis.

title: How to Import Obsidian Notes as Blog Posts
description: A step-by-step guide to publishing your Obsidian notes on cray_gitbook — handling images, wikilinks, and frontmatter.
